selections.name: Our Lady Peace
selections.reason: Tracked the speed and boxed on well for 3rd at this track last start. Deep into the prep and ready to peak despite the heavy conditions.

selections.name: Banner Banner
selections.reason: Has proven form on a Heavy 8 track with a close 2nd at Nowra two starts back. Forgives last start and can bounce back here.

selections.name: Copycat
selections.reason: Resuming for the elite Godolphin/Portelli stable with Alysha Collett aboard. Elite stable bonus applies; watch betting.

selections.name: Touching Hans
selections.reason: First starter for Matthew Smith who won a recent trial on a soft track. Looks ready to go on debut.

danger_horse.name: Banner Banner
danger_horse.reason: Proven heavy track ability makes him a massive threat if the top pick struggles in the mud.

selections.name: Sunday Tycoon
selections.reason: Won last start at this track on soft going. Drops to a very competitive 127lbs which is a huge advantage in this BM68 on a heavy track.

selections.name: Desi Emperor
selections.reason: Veteran with solid heavy track form (5:1-2-0). Third-up today and has won third-up in the past. Maps perfectly.

selections.name: Century Song
selections.reason: Talented but carries a massive 136lbs which triggers a double penalty on the Heavy 8 track. Class keeps him in the mix.

selections.name: Bode Akuna
selections.reason: Consistent type with 5 heavy track runs yielding 3 placings. Will be running on strongly late.

danger_horse.name: Desi Emperor
danger_horse.reason: Proven mudlark peaking third-up; will be right in the finish if the pace is genuine.

selections.name: Dance With Destiny (NZ)
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd at Newcastle over 1 3/8m on heavy going last start. Relishes the conditions and gets a great draw.

selections.name: Time For Snow
selections.reason: Consistent form with 7 placings from 13 starts. Held ground well for 2nd last start and trip suits perfectly.

selections.name: Aerostern Bro
selections.reason: Racing well recently and has placed twice on heavy tracks. Maps well from barrier 5.

selections.name: Think I Will
selections.reason: Faded late last start but blinkers go on today. Waterhouse/Bott runner who will be on the speed.

danger_horse.name: Time For Snow
danger_horse.reason: Overdue for a win and brings very consistent recent form into a winnable race.

selections.name: Smoke 'N' Darts
selections.reason: Crossed from a wide gate to lead and held on for 2nd last start. Drawn much better today and is the clear class of the race.

selections.name: She Can Salsa
selections.reason: Resuming after a solid 3rd on debut. Trialled well recently but must overcome the extreme outside barrier.

selections.name: Another Mission
selections.reason: Held ground for 3rd on a slow track last start. Wide draw is a concern but has the ability to feature.

selections.name: Galactic Force
selections.reason: Emergency gaining a start. Has placed on heavy going previously and gets the inside rail advantage.

danger_horse.name: She Can Salsa
danger_horse.reason: Lightly raced with upside; if she can cross from the wide draw without burning too much energy, she can win.

selections.name: Flying Party
selections.reason: Ciaron Maher runner who has placed 3 times from 5 starts. Has heavy track experience and gets the inside draw.

selections.name: Five Of A Kind
selections.reason: Hawkes-trained mare who made good ground for 2nd at this track last start. Ready to peak third-up.

selections.name: Hold My Drink
selections.reason: Consistent type with 5 placings from 7 starts. Narrowly beaten last start and must be respected.

selections.name: Col Du Tourmalet (NZ)
selections.reason: Faded slightly last start but showed promise on debut. Drops back slightly in trip which should suit.

danger_horse.name: Five Of A Kind
danger_horse.reason: Elite stable runner hitting peak fitness; perfectly drawn to stalk the pace and pounce.

selections.name: Thunder Lights
selections.reason: Dominant 4.5 length winner on a heavy track last start. Clearly relishes the mud and can overcome the wide draw.

selections.name: Brannum
selections.reason: Very consistent with 7 placings from 12 starts. Proven on heavy going (2:0-1-1) and draws well.

selections.name: Felis Chaus
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten for 2nd last start. Third-up and ready to peak, though heavy track form is an unknown.

selections.name: Autumn Blonde
selections.reason: Class dropper who was 4th in a much tougher race at Wagga last start. Has the back class to feature.

danger_horse.name: Brannum
danger_horse.reason: Ultra-consistent and proven in the slop; will be perfectly positioned from barrier 5.

selections.name: Olington Lane
selections.reason: Unbeaten in two starts, showing great tenacity to win on a soft track last time. Progressive and can handle the step up.

selections.name: Easiest Choice
selections.reason: Strong 3rd in a solid race last start. Has the tactical speed to overcome the wide draw if handled aggressively.

selections.name: Our Vinny
selections.reason: Broke maiden status at this track last start. Confidence is high and carries a light weight.

selections.name: Heuristic
selections.reason: Veteran with solid heavy track form (4:1-1-0). Drops in class and will be running on strongly late.

danger_horse.name: Easiest Choice
danger_horse.reason: Has the raw speed to cross the field and dictate terms; very dangerous if left alone in front.
